overall.description: A cinematic first-person view of a medieval tavern interior featuring wooden architecture, a glowing stone fireplace, and warm ambient lighting from a chandelier. The scene includes scattered furniture, barrels, and distant NPCs standing near the hearth and doorway. This is high-quality game engine footage with minimal camera movement, creating an atmospheric fantasy setting.

entered.detail: ornate circular chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling beams, casting warm light

wooden dining table with chairs arranged for patrons, partially visible in the mid-ground
framed landscape painting hanging on the wooden wall in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady first-person view of a cozy medieval tavern interior. Warm light emanates from an iron chandelier overhead and a stone fireplace on the right, illuminating wooden barrels, tables, and a metal platter on the floor. Two NPCs stand in the background—one near the flickering hearth and another by the distant doorway—while the scene remains static and atmospheric.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective within a cozy medieval tavern, capturing a still and atmospheric interior. It begins with a view of the warm, ambient light emanating from an iron chandelier overhead and a stone fireplace to the right. As the gaze lingers, the illumination reveals the textures of wooden barrels, scattered tables, and a metal platter resting on the floor. The scene then settles on the distant background, where two NPCs stand motionless, one beside the flickering hearth and another positioned by the far doorway.
